Bubble Pop

Tap a bubble to pop it. Match three of the same to make magic happen!

Score
0

Settings

For caregivers

Learning mode
What gets spoken when bubbles pop
Feelings shows faces (social-emotional learning). Start Sounds matches words by their first sound (Sun, Snake, Sock). End Sounds matches words that rhyme (cat, bat, hat).
How many to use
Start small, add more as she's ready
Voice speed
